summary: Iteration 56 - Favourites API Backend Testing. All 27 tests PASSED. Verified complete CRUD operations for the favourites system across all service types (hotels, travel, car_rental, restaurants, events, cinema, laundry, banquets, packages). Tested: 1) POST /api/favourites/ creates favourites with all fields. 2) GET /api/favourites/ returns user favourites with service_type filter and pagination. 3) DELETE /api/favourites/{service_type}/{item_id} removes favourites. 4) GET /api/favourites/ids bulk returns favourite IDs for results pages. 5) GET /api/favourites/check returns is_favourite boolean. 6) Duplicate add returns 'Already in favourites'. 7) User-scoped - different users have isolated favourites.

create_favourite_tests.test_01_create_favourite_hotels: PASS - Created hotel favourite with all fields
create_favourite_tests.test_02_create_favourite_travel: PASS - Created travel favourite with extra metadata

get_favourites_tests.test_07_get_all_favourites: PASS - Returns all user favourites with total count

user_scoping_tests.test_16_different_user_has_different_fav: PASS - Customer's favourites not visible to superadmin
user_scoping_tests.test_18_superadmin_favourite_not_visible: PASS - Superadmin's favourites not visible to customer

edge_case_tests.test_favourite_with_minimal_data: PASS - Works with only required fields
edge_case_tests.test_favourite_with_extra_metadata: PASS - Extra metadata stored in 'extra' field

cleanup.test_99_cleanup_test_data: PASS - All TEST_ prefixed data cleaned up

features_verified.POST /api/favourites/: VERIFIED - Creates favourite with service_type, item_id, item_name, item_location, item_price, item_rating, extra
features_verified.GET /api/favourites/: VERIFIED - Returns user favourites with service_type filter and pagination (skip/limit)
features_verified.DELETE /api/favourites/{service_type}/{i: VERIFIED - Removes favourite, returns 404 for non-existent
features_verified.GET /api/favourites/ids: VERIFIED - Returns list of favourite item_ids for bulk checking
features_verified.duplicate_handling: VERIFIED - Duplicate add returns 'Already in favourites' without creating duplicate
features_verified.user_scoped_favourites: VERIFIED - Different users have isolated favourites
features_verified.all_service_types: VERIFIED - Works for hotels, travel, car_rental, restaurants, events, cinema, laundry, banquets, packages

critical_code_review_comments: Favourites API correctly uses user_id scoping for all operations
The /ids endpoint is efficient for bulk checking in result pages - returns just item_ids
Extra metadata stored in 'extra' field allows flexible service-specific data
MongoDB _id is excluded from GET responses (using projection {'_id': 0})
seed_data_creation: Test favourites created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified Favourites CRUD API. Key endpoints: POST /api/favourites/ (create), GET /api/favourites/ (list with filter), DELETE /api/favourites/{service_type}/{item_id} (remove), GET /api/favourites/ids (bulk IDs), GET /api/favourites/check (single check). Favourites stored in 'favourites' MongoDB collection with fields: user_id, service_type, item_id, item_name, item_image, item_location, item_price, item_rating, extra, created_at. Frontend hook useFavourites.js uses /ids endpoint for efficient bulk checking on results pages.
